question: Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is a close-up of a snow leopard I photographed yesterday in the reserve: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a wildlife photography journal entry for posting on the National Geographic forum, with deeply interwoven text and image layout. First, write an introductory paragraph describing the hardship of staking out in minus twenty degrees Celsius, then expand my close-up image outward (outpainting) to generate a panoramic shot showing its full body and the surrounding rugged snowy mountain environment as the first accompanying image. Next, write a tense passage about it spotting prey and springing into action, paired with the second image you generate: a dynamic moment of it leaping downward on a steep rock face. Finally, write a reflective conclusion about life and nature, accompanied by the third image: a serene scene of it resting and licking its paws in the snow after a successful hunt. The total word count should be no less than 500 words.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Finally managed to make a trip to Iceland, only to find that my black sand beach photos are full of people: [IMAGE1]. I want to post a long photo-essay travelogue on my social media feed to both vent and show off. Please help me generate it in an interleaved text-and-image format. The first paragraph should humorously complain about the overwhelming number of tourists, accompanied by the pristine, empty black sand beach landscape photo that you've restored for me by removing all the tourists. The second paragraph should describe how we decided to wait in the car until midnight and finally witnessed a miracle, paired with the second image you generate: a breathtaking scene of brilliant green aurora appearing in the sky above the same beach. The third paragraph should describe our unexpected discovery deep on the beach the following morning, accompanied by the third image: an epic ancient Viking wooden ship beached on the shore. Each paragraph should convey genuine emotion and heartfelt sentiment.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm drawing a sci-fi short comic and have completed the first two panels so far. The first panel shows the protagonist discovering an anomaly: [IMAGE1]. The second panel shows the exterior view of the spaceship: [IMAGE2]. Help me generate a serialized update post for a comic platform, which should include story text and subsequent comic panels. Start with a few sentences to recap the crisis from the first two panels. Then continue the story in an 'alternating text and image' format for the next three scenes: Scene one depicts the protagonist's thrilling escape after pressing the button, accompanied by a comic panel showing the interior view of the escape pod ejecting; Scene two conveys the sense of despair as the escape pod drifts alone in space, accompanied by a corresponding image of drifting through the cosmos; Scene three reveals an unexpected discovery after landing, accompanied by an image of the escape pod crashing into an alien jungle filled with giant glowing plants. The text should have a sci-fi suspense feel, and the artwork must maintain consistent American comic style.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is my latest folding chair design sketch: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a verbatim script for a product pitch deck presentation for investors, with text and images interspersed throughout. The first section explains 'Design Philosophy and Materials', accompanied by a high-definition product photo rendered from the sketch, shot in a minimalist pure white studio. The second section explains 'Outdoor Application Scenarios', accompanied by a realistic usage photo of the chair placed on a sunny outdoor camping lawn (with a tent nearby). The third section explains 'Ultimate Portability', accompanied by a street photography shot of the chair folded up and being effortlessly carried by a model walking on a city street. Each speech segment should be professional and compelling, and the images should look like authentic commercial photography.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is the actual photo of the forest cabin our studio just completed: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a visually rich proposal presentation email for our VIP clients, showcasing the potential of this cabin across different seasons and artistic styles. Begin the email with a warm greeting. The first paragraph introduces the 'Autumn Fairy Tale' theme, accompanied by a realistic photo you generate of the deep autumn season (surrounded entirely by golden and fiery red fallen leaves). The second paragraph introduces the 'Anime Summer' cultural tourism IP concept, accompanied by an image you create by transforming it into a Ghibli animation-style summer scene. The third paragraph introduces the thermal insulation performance of 'Winter Sanctuary', accompanied by a realistic photo of a winter morning after a blizzard (with snow accumulated on the roof). Conclude with a closing expressing anticipation for collaboration.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I designed a modern trench coat with traditional embroidery elements, here is the flat lay: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) outfit and design sharing post. The title should be eye-catching. The body should be divided into three paragraphs with interspersed text and images: The first paragraph discusses 'When Tradition Meets Modern Street Style', accompanied by a street photography shot you generate of an Asian female model wearing this trench coat walking on the streets of Paris (showcasing the drape). The second paragraph discusses 'Three Months of Obsessing Over Intangible Cultural Heritage Embroidery Details', accompanied by a macro high-definition shot of the collar embroidery (showcasing the silk thread texture). The third paragraph covers 'Tailoring That Catches the Wind', accompanied by a dynamic moment shot of the model turning in a gentle breeze with the trench coat hem billowing. The copywriting should carry a touch of designer's pride and an artistic tone, with appropriate Emojis.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is a Beef Wellington I casually shot with my phone, from a top-down angle, the lighting is too dark: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a WeChat public account article for a high-end restaurant, showcasing our upgrades to this dish with rich visuals and text. The first section should be titled 'Classic Reimagined'—edit this photo to a 45-degree slight side angle with sophisticated side backlighting as a Michelin-star promotional photo for the accompanying image. The second section should be titled 'Luxurious Black Truffle Edition', paired with a dark-toned luxurious plating image featuring black truffle and red wine sauce. The third section should be titled 'French Minimalist Appetizer Edition', paired with a bright minimalist plating image with the dish cut into small pieces. Each section must include mouthwatering descriptions of food textures and an elevated sense of typography.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is the front-view character illustration of the female warrior I designed for my new game: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a game development log (DevLog) to post on the player community, with interleaved text and image layout. Start by thanking players for their support. The first section should be titled 'Character Three-View Reveal', providing a detailed introduction to the design philosophy behind the mecha armor, accompanied by back-view and side-view full-body images of her that you infer and generate based on the front view. The second section should be titled 'In-Game Combat Preview', describing her skill effects, accompanied by a battle CG illustration of her swinging the greatsword and unleashing blue sword energy on a ruined battlefield. The writing should be hardcore, filled with the passion of a game developer.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is an old photograph of a young girl from the 1920s: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a family memoir article titled 'A Gaze Across a Century,' with text and images interspersed. The first paragraph describes my excitement upon accidentally discovering my great-grandmother's photograph in the attic, accompanied by your restored and colorized high-definition photo (restoring realistic skin tones and clothing colors). The second paragraph describes her resilience at age 40 when she became a journalist during World War II, accompanied by your age-progressed image showing her mature appearance at 40, dressed in 1940s professional attire. The third paragraph describes her peaceful later years at age 70 in her garden, accompanied by your generated photo of her at 70 with silver hair yet still elegant and gracious. The text should be filled with a sense of historical weight and warmth.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I have a stock white sports car parked in my garage: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a video script or image-text post for a car modification channel, with alternating images and text. The first section is called 'Birth of the Dark Knight' — list the modification specs, accompanied by an image of the car repainted in matte black, fitted with a carbon fiber spoiler and forged wheels with red brake calipers (still in the garage setting). The second section is called 'Mount Akina Road Test' — describe the chassis support and handling, accompanied by a dynamic shot (panning shot) of it speeding along a winding autumn mountain road. The third section is called 'Tribute to the Sunset' — describe the exhaust note, accompanied by an image of it speeding on a desert highway at sunset. The text should include some car enthusiast jargon and slang.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is the first stage of the monarch butterfly's life cycle—the egg: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a column article titled 'The Magical Journey of the Monarch Butterfly' for a children's science magazine, with text and images interspersed. The introduction should first introduce this tiny egg (referencing the original image). Then divide into three sections: Section 1 'The Hungry Caterpillar', describe the larval stage in playful, child-friendly language, accompanied by a high-definition macro image of a hatched caterpillar with black, yellow, and white stripes munching on leaves. Section 2 'The Magical Sleeping Bag', describe the pupation process, accompanied by an image of a green chrysalis with gold trim hanging from a branch. Section 3 'Breaking Free as a Butterfly', describe the eclosion, accompanied by an image of a beautiful adult monarch butterfly perched on a flower drying its wings. The layout should be clear, and the language should be vivid and easy to understand.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is the homepage wireframe of a smart home App I designed: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a UI/UX design retrospective article to be posted on Zcool, with images and text interspersed throughout. The first section should be titled 'Visual Style Exploration', explaining the combination of dark mode with Glassmorphism, accompanied by the high-fidelity homepage UI design you converted (using neon blue as the accent color). The second section should be titled 'Micro-interaction Design: Lighting Control', accompanied by an interface image showing the expanded color palette and brightness control panel after clicking 'Lighting'. The third section should be titled 'Scenario-based Design: Security Mode', accompanied by an interface image showing the real-time surveillance feed and alarm button displayed after clicking 'Security'. The text should reflect professional design thinking and interaction logic.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I took a very ordinary morning forest landscape photo: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a digital art tutorial blog post teaching people how to transform throwaway shots into fantasy concept art, with images and text interwoven. Step 1 'Finding the Visual Center' - explain how to utilize light and shadow, accompanied by an image where a glowing antlered mythical creature is naturally integrated into the center of the frame under the sunlight. Step 2 'Crafting Details and Emotion' - explain how to zoom in to emphasize interaction, accompanied by a close-up image of the mythical creature lowering its head to kiss glowing blue mushrooms. Step 3 'Subverting the World View' - explain how to reconstruct the background through a wide shot, accompanied by a grand distant view revealing that this forest is actually floating above a sea of clouds. Each step should include specific operational guidance and explanations.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is the beginning of a wuxia story. Act One, the swordsman arrives before the inn: [IMAGE1]. Act Two, the swordsman pushes the door open, and everyone freezes: [IMAGE2]. Help me continue writing the first chapter of this wuxia novel, formatted in the light novel style with interspersed text and illustrations. Continue from the tense atmosphere of the first two acts: First, write a passage describing the assassin suddenly springing into action to attack, accompanied by an ink wash illustration of a masked assassin in the corner drawing a blade and leaping to strike at the swordsman. Then, write a passage describing the swordsman calmly responding with his inner force reverberating, accompanied by a close-up ink wash illustration of the swordsman not drawing his sword, blocking only with the scabbard as sparks fly. Finally, write a passage describing the dust settling and everyone being struck with dread, accompanied by an illustration of the assassin collapsed on the ground while the swordsman quietly sits at a table pouring wine. The novel's prose should have the concise style and cinematic imagery characteristic of Gu Long.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is a selfie I took in front of a white wall at home: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a long-form personal branding article to post on professional social networking platforms (such as LinkedIn), with images interspersed throughout the text. The first paragraph discusses 'the importance of first impressions,' accompanied by this selfie edited into a professional corporate headshot (navy blue suit, high-end office building background, professional lighting). The second paragraph discusses 'continuously delivering industry value,' accompanied by an image of him confidently giving a speech on stage in a large conference room. The third paragraph discusses 'staying on the move,' accompanied by a business image of him looking down at a tablet computer in first class. The copy should be filled with workplace positivity and an elite vibe.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is the living room of the unfinished apartment I just bought: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a renovation diary to post on the 'Haohaozhu' App, exploring three possibilities for the same unfinished apartment, with text and images interspersed. The first paragraph should be titled 'Longing for Tranquility: Wabi-Sabi Style', analyzing the pairing of microcement and natural wood, accompanied by your rendered Wabi-Sabi style visualization (preserving the original floor-to-ceiling window structure). The second paragraph should be titled 'Romance at Heart: Vintage French Style', analyzing the textures of plaster moldings and velvet sofas, accompanied by a vintage French style rendering. The third paragraph should be titled 'Restrained Ruggedness: Modern Industrial Style', analyzing the collision of metal frameworks with the preserved cement walls, accompanied by an industrial style rendering. The writing should have the professionalism and lifestyle charm of a home decor blogger.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is the blank packaging box mockup for our newly launched premium tea: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a brand packaging design proposal document with interspersed text and images. Part One 'Visual Concept Presentation': elaborate on the design philosophy of 'Song Dynasty blue-green landscape painting', accompanied by images of the complete outer packaging box and tea canister featuring blue-green landscape artwork and a gold-foil stamped logo. Part Two 'Unboxing Experience Design': describe the sense of surprise when opening the packaging, accompanied by detailed images of the packaging box being opened (with silk lining inside) and the tea canister lid half-open revealing verdant tea leaves. Part Three 'Lifestyle Scene Integration': describe the ambiance of the product during actual tea appreciation, accompanied by a scene image set in an antique-style tea room with tea steeping in a Ru ware tea bowl (with the packaging box as background). The copy should be sophisticated and culturally refined.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is a detail from the world-famous painting 'Girl with a Pearl Earring': [IMAGE1]. Help me write a long-form art history article titled 'Vermeer Beyond the Frame,' with interspersed text and images. The first section explores 'What if the painting were completed?' accompanied by an oil painting image generated using Outpainting technology showing the girl's full figure and a 17th-century Dutch interior setting. The second section explores 'The Painter's Gaze,' describing Vermeer's perspective while painting, accompanied by an image from the painter's first-person point of view showing the canvas, paintbrushes, and the girl posing by the window. The third section explores 'The Bystander of History,' accompanied by an image from an exterior viewpoint looking through the window glass at the indoor painting scene. The writing should have scholarly depth and elegant artistic appreciation.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is the current state of the bustling New York Times Square: [IMAGE1]. Help me write a preface for a post-apocalyptic survival film's art design book, with interspersed text and images. The first paragraph describes 'The Fall of Civilization', depicting the deathly silence 50 years after humanity's disappearance, accompanied by an image of Times Square transformed into a dilapidated wasteland overgrown with vines, flooded streets, and rusted cars. The second paragraph describes 'Nature's Reclamation', depicting how wildlife takes over the steel jungle, accompanied by a storyboard image of a herd of mutated wild deer leaping across abandoned taxi rooftops. The third paragraph describes 'A Faint Spark of Hope', depicting the survivors' arduous struggle for survival, accompanied by a storyboard image of survivors lighting a campfire beneath remnant billboards as night falls. The text should be filled with the desolate and epic atmosphere of the apocalypse.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is an ordinary wooden guitar: [IMAGE1]. Help me create an illustrated Wiki page for game item lore, themed 'The Bard's Three Elemental Artifacts'. Requirement: keep the original guitar's basic silhouette unchanged. The first section introduces 'Voice of Ashes · Flame Guitar', describing its berserk attributes, accompanied by an image where the body is composed of burning lava and obsidian, with strings made of fire. The second section introduces 'Winter's Lament · Frost Guitar', describing its crowd control skills, accompanied by an image where the entire instrument is carved from crystal-clear ice, emanating cold mist. The third section introduces 'Song of Revival · Nature Guitar', describing its healing effects, accompanied by an image where the body is formed from intertwining ancient tree vines and blooming flowers. The layout should resemble a real Wikipedia page, including attribute panel text.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I took a series of photos of a desert highway [IMAGE1], and previously used Photoshop to create an outpainted version (sky extended upward by double the height) [IMAGE2]. Now I've also taken a photo of seaside rocks [IMAGE3] and a photo of highland meadows [IMAGE4]. Please apply the same technique to outpaint each of them separately, and after completing each one, explain what processing you did in the newly added areas. Please apply the same sky upward extension by double the height treatment to both the seaside rocks and highland meadows photos separately. After processing each one, explain to me what details you added in the newly extended sky area and how you ensured a natural seamless transition with the original image.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: These are the first two panels of a four-panel comic I drew:
Panel 1 [IMAGE1]: Character A discovers a mysterious hexagonal copper box on the table.
Panel 2 [IMAGE2]: Character A opens the box, and a dazzling golden beam of light shoots out from inside.
Please help me complete panels 3 and 4. After finishing each panel, include storyboard notes covering camera language, character emotions, and narrative pacing analysis. Help me draw panels 3 and 4 to complete this four-panel comic, maintaining exactly the same art style, line weight, and cel-shading as the first two panels. Make panel 4 a comedic twist ending. After completing each panel, write a storyboard explanation telling me what shot type you used, how the character's emotions change, and why you arranged the narrative pacing this way.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm working on product color scheme iterations. The original design [IMAGE1] has a cool tone, and the first warm color revision [IMAGE2] turned out too vibrant. Please provide me with two compromise versions, showing me the rendered effect for each along with a color analysis (including HSB value ranges and color psychology rationale). Please create two compromise color schemes for me: one in a warm apricot tone, and one in a warm grayish milk tea tone. Show me the rendered effect for each version, then analyze the approximate HSB range of the color scheme, explain why it's suitable for this type of consumer electronics product, and provide analysis from both color psychology and material texture perspectives.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: [IMAGE1] is a photo of my cat. I previously converted my dog's photo into Ghibli style [IMAGE2]→[IMAGE3], and I was very satisfied with the result. Now please process the cat photo in the same style, then help me combine the Ghibli versions of the cat and dog into one image, design a heartwarming scene with them together, and finally write a caption suitable for posting on social media. First help me convert the cat photo into the exact same Ghibli style, then place the Ghibli versions of the cat and dog into one scene—draw a heartwarming image of them playing together in a Ghibli-style flower field. Finally, help me write a cute caption suitable for posting on social media, with a bit of that Miyazaki healing vibe.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is the before photo of my balcony renovation [IMAGE1]. I asked a designer to create renderings for two schemes—Scheme A in Japanese Zen style [IMAGE2] and Scheme B in Scandinavian minimalist style [IMAGE3]. Please create a comparative analysis report for me, selecting three detail points from each scheme to zoom in and display, analyzing the pros and cons of each, and finally give me your recommendation. Create a detailed comparative analysis for me—select three detail points from Scheme A and three detail points from Scheme B, crop and zoom in on each for display, analyze the design highlights and potential issues for each detail point (such as practicality, maintenance difficulty, cost), and finally provide a comprehensive comparison with your recommendation on which scheme to choose.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: Here are the first three frames of the ink wash animation storyboard I drew:
[IMAGE1] A crane flying in from the distant mountains
[IMAGE2] The crane skimming over the lake surface
[IMAGE3] The crane landing on a withered lotus stem
Please help me continue by drawing the fourth and fifth frames to conclude this shot, and write a director's statement for all five frames explaining your design intentions regarding camera movement and ink wash negative space. Help me continue by drawing the fourth frame (crane folding its wings and standing still) and the fifth frame (long shot pulling back with the crane becoming a mere dot in the center of the lake), maintaining the ink wash style and ink tonal system. After completing the drawings, write a director's statement analyzing the camera movement rhythm of these five frames progressing from far to near and back to far, the proportional changes in ink wash negative space, and the overall approach to creating the artistic conception of this shot sequence.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I've completed the first three steps of portrait retouching in PS:
Original [IMAGE1] → Skin smoothing & skin tone adjustment [IMAGE2] → Liquify face slimming [IMAGE3]
Now I want to complete step four (teal and orange color grading) and step five (adding light effects and atmosphere) all at once. Show me the result after each step is done, and annotate which parameters you adjusted. Help me continue with step four teal and orange color grading (shadows shifted toward teal / highlights shifted toward warm orange / increased contrast / added film grain texture) and step five adding light effects and atmosphere (adding backlight lens flare and light leak effects). Show me the image after each step is done, then tell me in PS terminology roughly which parameters you adjusted—such as which direction the Color Balance was shifted, how the Curves were pulled, what blending mode was used for the light effects, and so on.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: [IMAGE1] is the original design of our logo, [IMAGE2] is revision 1 with a green color scheme, [IMAGE3] is revision 2 which simplified the graphics based on the green version. The boss said to use the simplified graphics from revision 2 + the blue color scheme from the original version for the final version. Also, once the final version is confirmed, please generate mockups for three application scenarios (business card, mobile APP splash screen, glass door decal), with a design note for each scenario. First, help me combine the simplified graphics from revision 2 with the blue color scheme from the original version (deep navy blue + light sky blue + white) to create the final logo. Then help me create three application scenario mockups: (1) placed on a dark business card (2) made into a mobile APP splash screen (3) an effect rendering applied as a decal on a company glass door. Include a note with each mockup providing dimensions and craft/process recommendations.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I'm working on a fixed-camera-position city four seasons photography project:
Spring [IMAGE1]
Summer [IMAGE2]
Autumn [IMAGE3]
Please generate the winter version for me, then help me design a final exhibition poster combining all four seasons, along with a curatorial foreword. Generate the winter version for me, with accumulated snow but not actively snowing, same camera position and focal length. Then create a four-seasons composite exhibition poster for me—arrange the four photos in spring, summer, autumn, winter order, add the project title and my name (Photographer: Lin Mo), and finally write a curatorial foreword of approximately 100 words.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is a black-and-white family portrait from the 1950s[IMAGE1], and I have manually colorized the left half[IMAGE2]. Please help me complete the colorization of the right half, then help me repair the scratches and fading issues on the entire photo, and finally produce a complete restored and colorized version. Show me the intermediate results for each step and explain your processing strategy. First help me colorize the right half—use deep navy blue for the Zhongshan suit and dark grayish-brown for the felt hat, the rest is up to you but ensure seamless blending with the left half. Show me the result after colorization. Then help me repair the scratches and fading on the entire photo, and produce a final perfectly restored version. Show me intermediate results for each step and explain your processing approach.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I have designed the first two pages of an APP onboarding flow:
Page 1 'Explore Infinity' [IMAGE1]
Page 2 'Smart Recommendations' [IMAGE2]
Please help me design Page 3 'Community Interaction' and Page 4 'Start Your Journey', then help me compile a design specification document recording this onboarding flow's color system, typography hierarchy, spacing, and interaction rules. Help me continue designing Page 3 'Community Interaction' and Page 4 'Start Your Journey', keeping the design language, color scheme, typography, and layout consistent with the first two pages, with illustrations in the same 3D abstract series style but not identical. Change the Page 4 button to a solid purple 'Get Started' button. Finally, help me compile a concise design specification document (Design Spec), including color values, font sizes and weights, spacing values, and interaction state definitions for indicators and buttons.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I captured a series of city sunrise time-lapse footage:
[IMAGE1] 05:30 sky faintly brightening
[IMAGE2] 05:50 morning glow appearing
[IMAGE3] 06:10 sun emerging above the horizon
Please generate two additional frames for 06:30 and 07:00, then create a horizontally arranged five-frame time-lapse comparison panorama with each frame's time and color temperature value annotated at the bottom. Please generate two frames for 06:30 and 07:00, where the sun should be fully risen and progressively higher. Then create a horizontally arranged five-frame time-lapse comparison panorama (05:30→05:50→06:10→06:30→07:00), with each frame's time and approximate color temperature K value annotated at the bottom.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is my tea packaging project:
[IMAGE1] Flat dieline (box structure + original gongbi-style camellia pattern)
[IMAGE2] 3D box mockup with the original pattern
[IMAGE3] Newly designed ink splash style pattern
Please help me generate a 3D mockup with the new pattern applied, then create a complete brand presentation image for the full packaging suite (including the box, tote bag, and seal sticker), and write a paragraph explaining the pattern design. First, help me generate a 3D box mockup with the new ink splash pattern applied, keeping the text and box structure unchanged. Then, help me extend this into a complete brand collateral presentation image — place the box, a matching-style tote bag, and seal sticker together for a brand identity showcase. Finally, write a design rationale of approximately 100 words explaining why the ink splash style was chosen and its relationship to the brand's aesthetic identity.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: I've created a retro poster series:
[IMAGE1] The first one with a 'Space Exploration' theme
[IMAGE2] The second one with a 'Deep Sea Adventure' theme
Please use the same series design language to create the third poster 'Desert Expedition' and the fourth poster 'Polar Crossing', with printing process recommendations (paper, ink, post-processing) for each poster. Create the third poster 'Desert Expedition' CROSS THE DESERT NO.03 and the fourth poster 'Polar Crossing' BRAVE THE POLAR NO.04 for me, maintaining series consistency with the 5-color limitation, screen printing style, and distressed effect throughout. After completing each poster, please recommend what paper, what ink, and whether distressed post-processing should be applied if actually screen printing.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: These are the two completed species pages from my botanical scientific illustration guide:
[IMAGE1] Ginkgo
[IMAGE2] Dawn Redwood
Please help me illustrate the guide pages for the third species—Chinese Tulip Tree—and the fourth species—Dove Tree. After completing each species' guide page, attach a 50-character morphological identification key (to be printed at the bottom of the guide page). Help me illustrate the guide pages for Chinese Tulip Tree (Liriodendron chinense) and Dove Tree (Davidia involucrata), maintaining the same layout, painting style, color tones, and detail illustration arrangement as the previous two pages. For Chinese Tulip Tree, emphasize the saddle-shaped (tulip-tree-shaped) leaves and tulip-like flowers; for Dove Tree, feature the large white bracts (dove flowers). After completing each, help me write a 50-character morphological identification key for placement at the bottom of the guide page.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: This is a creative composite I made in PS: source material [IMAGE1] salt lake portrait → finished product [IMAGE2] with a semi-transparent giant whale added to the sky.
Now I have two new source materials—[IMAGE3] mountaintop portrait and [IMAGE4] wheat field portrait. Please use the same technique to composite each one separately, and after completing each composite, tell me what animal you chose and why you think it suits that scene. Please use the same surreal technique with semi-transparency + glowing edges to composite these two source materials separately, don't use a whale this time—choose different animals. After completing each one, tell me what animal you chose and why you think it fits the scene visually and atmospherically.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: These are my company's quarterly infographics for Q1[IMAGE1] and Q2[IMAGE2]. Q3 data: Revenue 42 million yuan (+8%), Users 3.8 million (+15%), Satisfaction rate 92% (+1%), New product launches 3 items. Please create the Q3 infographic for me, then create a first-half annual (Q1-Q3) data trend summary chart, and write a data insights summary for management. First, create the Q3 infographic for me, maintaining the same design style with updated data. Then create a Q1-Q3 trend summary chart—use line graphs or bar charts to display the revenue and user count growth trends across the three quarters, with a design style unified with the single-quarter infographics. Finally, write a data insights summary of approximately 150 words for management, focusing on analyzing growth rate change trends and signals worth noting.

Please help me complete the following task by generating content in an interleaved format of images and text: These are the ingredients I've prepared for making a Black Forest cake: [IMAGE1]. Help me write an ultra-detailed baking tutorial for posting on a food blog, requiring deep integration of text and images, with a total word count of no less than 600 words.
